search.noResultsBody: We couldn’t find a match — but it’s never a dead end. Try one of these popular categories, or browse by city.

footer.tagline: Japan’s local business directory. Discover, review, and connect with businesses across every prefecture — in English and 日本語.
footer.copyright: © {year} NihonPages. Independent directory. Not affiliated with any government body.
footer.madeIn: Made in Japan · データは参考情報です

cookie.text: We use only essential cookies by default. Optional analytics cookies help us improve the directory — they stay off unless you accept.

badges.verifiedAdminTip: Ownership documents checked by our team.
badges.verifiedCommunityTip: Confirmed by contributor reports and open data.

home.heroTitle: Find the right local business, anywhere in Japan.
home.heroSubtitle: Restaurants, clinics, contractors, shops and more — with real reviews, verified profiles, and opening hours you can trust.
home.launchPromo: Launch promotion: 50% off every plan. Pick a plan and your listing goes live after a quick human review.
home.dataHubTitle: Every company. One clean table. No ads.
home.dataHubBody: Search, filter and export the full company database through a fast, dense table built for B2B teams — advanced filters, saved searches, and CSV export with clear monthly quotas.

category.noMatchesBody: Try removing a filter, or explore a nearby city.

location.intro: {count} businesses listed in {city}, {prefecture}. Filter by category, rating or opening hours to find exactly what you need.

cities.title: Browse by city
cities.subtitle: {cityCount} cities across {prefCount} prefectures, grouped the way Japan is — by 都道府県.

browse.title: Browse categories
browse.subtitle: Every category is colour-coded by group — the same tab colours you see across the site. Pick a group tab or search to narrow down.

company.askIntro: Ask the owner or the community a question about {name}.
company.signInToAsk: Sign in to ask a question
company.noQuestions: No questions yet — be the first to ask.
company.requestQuoteBody: Send {name} a quick brief and get a price estimate.
company.reviewPlaceholder: Share what your visit was like — what stood out, and who it’s good for.
company.minChars: Minimum 10 characters. Reviews are human-approved before publishing.
company.signInToReview: Sign in to write a review — your account keeps your review history.
company.thanksTitle: Thanks — your review was submitted for review.
company.thanksBody: Every review is checked by a human before it’s published (usually within 24 hours). We’ll email you when it’s live.
company.receiptVerifiedTip: Reviewer uploaded a receipt; weighted higher in the average.

report.title: Report a problem with a listing
report.subtitle: Spotted wrong details, a closed business, or an abusive review? Tell us and we’ll investigate.
report.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us what’s wrong and, if you can, what it should say instead.
report.emailHint: Only if you’d like us to follow up.
report.couldNotSubmit: Could not submit the report. Try again.
report.sentBody: Thanks for the heads-up — our team will review {name} and take action if needed.

contact.title: Contact & support
contact.subtitle: Questions about a listing, your account, or billing? Send us a note and we’ll reply by email — usually within one business day.
contact.sentBody: Thanks — we’ve received your message and will reply to your email shortly.
contact.name: Name
contact.couldNotSend: Could not send your message. Try again.
contact.responseTimesRemoval: Removal requests: up to 3 business days after email verification.

removeCompany.title: Remove my company
removeCompany.subtitle: Request removal of a listing. To protect businesses from malicious requests, our team verifies the request before removing anything (usually within 3 business days).
removeCompany.sentBody: We’ll verify and review your request. The listing stays live until the review is complete.
removeCompany.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us why this listing should be removed.

holidays.title: Public holidays in Japan
holidays.subtitle: National holidays (国民の祝日). Many businesses close or shorten hours on these days.
holidays.footer: {count} national holidays in {year}. When a holiday falls on a Sunday, the following weekday becomes a substitute holiday (振替休日).

account.noFavoritesBody: Tap the bookmark on any listing to save it here for quick access — even offline once installed.
account.savedCount: {count, plural, one {# saved business} other {# saved businesses}}
account.noReviewsBody: Reviews you write appear here. Each one is checked by a human before it goes live.
account.noEditsBody: Spotted wrong hours or a changed phone number? Use “Suggest an edit” on any profile — your suggestions show up here.
account.digestHelp: New businesses in your saved cities and categories.
account.repliesHelp: When an owner responds to a review you wrote.
account.answersHelp: When a question you asked gets answered.

claim.signInHeading: Sign in to claim a listing
claim.signInIntro: Claiming links a business to your account so you can manage it.
claim.title: Claim your listing
claim.subtitle: Verify you represent the business and get instant edit access — no duplicate profiles.
claim.methodEmailDesc: We send a code to the address on file for this listing.
claim.methodPhoneDesc: We call or SMS the listed business number with a code.
claim.methodDocsDesc: Match against the National Tax Agency corporate number, checked by our team.
claim.docsSubmittedBody: We’ll match your claim against National Tax Agency open data and a human will check it within 1–2 business days. You’ll see it under your account once approved.
claim.enterCodeEmail: We sent a 6-digit code to the email on file for this listing.
claim.enterCodePhone: We sent a 6-digit code by SMS to the phone on file for this listing.
claim.enterCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code we sent you.
claim.demoHint: Demo: enter any 6 digits (there's no real SMS dispatch here).
claim.emailRealHint: Check your inbox — this code is real and expires in 10 minutes.
claim.claimedBody: {name} is now linked to your account. You can edit it any time.

wizard.title: Get your business listed
wizard.subtitle: Five quick steps. Your listing goes live after a short human review — usually within a day.
wizard.errPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
wizard.errDescription: Add a description of at least 20 characters.
wizard.passwordHint: Used to sign in and manage your listing.
wizard.descriptionPlaceholder: What your business does, who it’s for, what makes it worth visiting.
wizard.keywordsHint: Help people find you in search.
wizard.photosHint: Add image URLs. In production these are secure uploads (S3 signed URLs).
wizard.stripeTestBody: No real charge is made. Use card 4242 4242 4242 4242, any future expiry, any CVC. Live checkout uses Stripe Elements — card details never touch our servers.
wizard.agreeTerms: By submitting you agree to our
wizard.moderationNote: Your listing enters our moderation queue and goes live after a human review.
wizard.thanksBody: Thanks, {name} — {business} is in our moderation queue. We’ll email {email} when it’s live (usually within a day).
wizard.confirmingPayment: Confirming your payment — this only takes a moment…
wizard.paymentCanceled: Payment was canceled. Your details are still here — pick up whenever you’re ready.

saas.title: Every company in Japan. One clean table.
saas.subtitle: Search, filter and export {count} company records through a fast, dense interface built for sales, research and operations teams. No ads, ever.
saas.openLiveApp: Open the live table app — filters, saved searches, CSV export with quotas →
